title: Deceased estates
description: What to do when someone dies, getting authority to deal with the ATO, lodging a final tax return, and trust tax returns.
keywords: Tax when person dies, tax when someone dies, deceased estates tax, inheritance tax, death tax, deceased estate executor, deceased estate administrator, ato deceased estates

child_links.title: Checklist: what to do when someone dies
child_links.description: Use this step-by-step checklist to manage tax for a deceased estate.

child_links.title: Who can represent a deceased estate
child_links.description: How to become a legal personal representative (LPR), get a grant of probate and appoint a tax agent.

child_links.title: Notifying us of a death and who will manage the estate
child_links.description: Who can notify us, how to notify, and what documents you will need.

child_links.title: Accessing a deceased person's tax and super information
child_links.description: Who can access the tax and super information we hold, and how to get it.

child_links.title: Doing a final tax return for the deceased person
child_links.description: Work out if a 'date of death' tax return is required, how to lodge, and who can receive any refund.

child_links.title: Doing trust tax returns for the deceased estate
child_links.description: When and how to lodge a trust tax return, income to include, how tax applies, how to get a TFN and ABN, and tax rates.

child_links.title: Confirming tax obligations are complete
child_links.description: Check that all tax obligations are complete before the final distribution of the deceased estate.

child_links.title: If you are a beneficiary of a deceased estate
child_links.description: Work out if there is tax on money or assets you inherited, or are presently entitled to.
